entities.name: STREPTOMYCES
entities.description: Gram-positive bacterium with high guanine + cytosine content, belonging to the family Streptomycetaceae and order Actinomycetales

entities.name: MARINE WATER
entities.description: Saltwater environment where Streptomyces is commonly found

entities.name: FRESH WATER
entities.description: Non-saline water environment where Streptomyces is commonly found

entities.name: RHIZOSPHERE SOIL
entities.description: Soil in the immediate vicinity of plant roots where Streptomyces is commonly found

entities.name: COMPOST
entities.description: Decomposed organic matter where Streptomyces is commonly found

entities.name: VERMICOMPOST
entities.description: Organic matter decomposed by earthworms where Streptomyces is commonly found

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH PROMOTION
entities.description: The process of enhancing plant growth, in which Streptomyces plays an important role

entities.name: PLANT HEALTH PROMOTION
entities.description: The process of improving plant health and protection, in which Streptomyces plays an important role

entities.name: CROP PROTECTION
entities.description: The practice of managing pests and diseases to protect crops

entities.name: DEGRADATION OF ORGANIC RESIDUES
entities.description: The process of breaking down organic matter

entities.name: SECONDARY METABOLITES

entities.name: SHOOT GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of the above-ground part of the plant

entities.name: ROOT GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of the below-ground part of the plant

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain harvested per unit area

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The amount of vegetative plant parts harvested per unit area

entities.name: BIOLOGIC NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into a usable form for plants

entities.name: SOLUBILIZATION OF MINERALS
entities.description: The process of making minerals like phosphorus and zinc available to plants
